body: "Details of the application  The Environment Agency has received a variation application for an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016 from Severn Trent Water Limited.  Application number  S/16/26056/R/V006  Regulated facility type  Wastewater treatment works  Regulated facility address   Broadway Sewage Treatment WorksPry LaneBroadwayEveshamWorcestershireWR12 7LX   National grid reference discharge point  SP 07873 37773  Receiving environment  Tributary of Badsey Brook  Effluent type  Secondary treated sewage with nutrient removal and settled storm sewage  Volume  1,700 cubic metres per day (secondary treated sewage effluent with nutrient removal) and dependent upon rainfall and/or snow melt (settled storm sewage)  How to view the application  Please contact us via e-mail at psc-waterquality@environment-agency.gov.uk or contact us on 03708 506 506 to arrange to see the application documents.  How to comment on the application  If you have any comments on the application send these by 17 February 2025. You can comment:  Via email: psc-waterquality@environment-agency.gov.uk  For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail please call 03708 506 506.  The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.  The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at https://www.gov.uk/guidance/environmental-permits-privacy-notice "
